title: ESDC programs and policy development - Canada.ca
content:
## Programs and policy development
Employment and social development programs and policies and activities related to their development to support the Government of Canada. This includes consultations, frameworks, plans and research.
- Programs Skills and employment Learning Labour Income security Social development Service network supporting government departments Delivery of services for other Government of Canada programs

- Service network supporting government departments
- Delivery of services for other Government of Canada programs
